title: Presumption of Innocence
description: In many legal systems, a defendant is presumed innocent until proven guilty beyond a reasonable doubt.

title: Contract Elements
description: A valid contract typically requires an offer, acceptance, consideration, and the intention to create legal relations.

title: Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: A non-disclosure agreement is a contract that creates a confidential relationship between parties and restricts the sharing of specified information.

title: No Guaranteed Outcome
description: Lawyers cannot guarantee a specific outcome in litigation because court decisions depend on many factors beyond their control.
